title: MCP Architecture, Negotiation, and Trust Boundaries · Threat Case: Spec Versioning
summary: Trace one tool call across host, client, server, and external system. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext spec versioning increment in an MCP architecture and threat-boundary diagram. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Target a named stable specification and isolate release-candidate changes.
Map permissions, data flow, instruction authority, and side effects at each boundary.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
